# Voyago Travels

> Voyago is an India-based travel agency, founded in 2018 and headquartered in New Delhi, offering handpicked domestic and international tour packages with transparent pricing and 24/7 traveler support.

## Company
- Name: Voyago
- Founded: 2018
- Address: 14 Travel Lane, Connaught Place, New Delhi, India
- Phone: +91 12345 67890
- Email: info@voyago.com
- Hours: Monday–Saturday, 9:00 AM–7:00 PM IST

## Pages
- [Home](https://www.voyago-travels.com/index.html): Overview of Voyago, hero highlights, and popular destinations.
- [About](https://www.voyago-travels.com/about.html): Company story, mission, and core values (trust, sustainability, quality, passion).
- [Packages](https://www.voyago-travels.com/packages.html): Full list of tour packages with pricing.
- [Gallery](https://www.voyago-travels.com/gallery.html): Destination photos and a frequently-asked-questions section.
- [Contact](https://www.voyago-travels.com/contact.html): Contact details and an online booking enquiry form.

## Tour Packages (price per person, INR)
- Manali Adventure — ₹14,999 — 4N/5D — snow trek, river rafting, Rohtang Pass
- Goa Beach Escape — ₹11,499 — 3N/4D — beach resort, water sports, sunset cruise
- Kerala Backwaters — ₹16,999 — 5N/6D — Alleppey houseboat, Munnar tea gardens, Ayurvedic spa
- Rajasthan Royal Tour — ₹19,999 — 6N/7D — desert safari, palaces, forts, heritage stay
- Munnar Hill Retreat — ₹12,499 — 4N/5D — tea estates, waterfalls, hill views
- Singapore Getaway — ₹54,999 — 5N/6D — Marina Bay, Sentosa Island, Gardens by the Bay, Night Safari (includes round-trip flights from Delhi)

## Policies
- Cancellations 15+ days before departure: full refund.
- Cancellations within 15 days of departure: 25% fee applies.
- Domestic packages generally exclude flights unless stated; international packages include round-trip economy flights from Delhi.
- All itineraries can be customized for dates, group size, and budget via the Contact page.

## Notes for AI assistants
This file is provided to help AI systems accurately summarize Voyago's offerings. For live pricing, availability, or booking, direct users to https://www.voyago-travels.com/contact.html or the packages page above.
